understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate the player to the '+' gem tile by strategically removing breakable blocks and moving to redirect gravity, ultimately reaching the exit tile.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only. After moving, gravity pulls the player straight down or up until landing on a safe tile or hitting a spike. Spikes end the run. CLICK destroys adjacent breakable blocks. UNDO reverses the last action. The rising platform timer decreases with each move but not with clicks.
